Alpha AI (AI infrastructure) ERC-20 with 885 holders and verified contract; no documented incidents. Note ticker collides with Alpha Finance Lab (0xa1faa113cbe53436df28ff0aee54275c13b40975) which is the legacy DeFi lender.
Book of Meme 3.0 ERC-20 on Ethereum; a bridged/Ethereum variant of the Solana BOME meme project. Solana BOME is verified-legitimate; no rug pull reports against either.
Kermit meme coin with 1,239 holders, verified contract, LP burned, contract renounced, zero taxes per project description. No scam evidence.
SORA GROK — AI text-to-video branded memecoin; community project, not affiliated with xAI. Ticker collides with other GROK tokens (0x8390a1da07e376ef7add4be859ba74fb83aa02d5 is a different Grok).
Bitpanda Vision — native token of regulated EU exchange Bitpanda's Web3 ecosystem; listed on Gate, has Chainlink CCIP integration, governance utility. Legitimate exchange token.

zkPass (ZKP) — zero-knowledge identity protocol; note this is DIFFERENT from Panther Protocol ZKP at 0x909e34d3f6124c324ac83dcca84b74398a6fa173. Contract verified, no scam reports; ticker collision with Panther Protocol.

Apu Apustaja (Peepo) — community meme coin launched 2024 with renounced contract, zero taxes, trades on Uniswap V2/Curve/Balancer; well-established Pepe-adjacent meme with tens of thousands of holders.

Etherscan shows token named 'Prelude of the Night' (symbol FAITH) with 248 holders, no market data, no documented history. Appears to be a low-activity speculative token; insufficient evidence for a verdict.

Ibiza Final Boss — viral memecoin (originally Base chain, bridged to ETH); well-documented in crypto press as a large-scale legitimate meme moment that pumped 400x then crashed 85% — volatile but not fraudulent.

Etherscan shows token named 'ETHEREAL' with 1,022 holders, unknown reputation. NOT the legitimate Ethereal DEX (Ethena ecosystem project) which has not yet distributed its token. Likely an impersonator or unrelated memecoin, but no definitive scam evidence.
Supergrok memecoin riffing on xAI's SuperGrok product; 2,811 holders, verified contract. Unaffiliated with xAI but no documented rug pull; speculative meme.
Osmi AI — 480 holders, 420.69B supply (meme-style), verified contract. No scam documented but thin liquidity.

StakeStone Berachain Vault Token — legitimate LRT/vault receipt for Berachain's Proof of Liquidity. High-volume vault mechanics drive anomalous flows; same category as rstETH/hemiBTC in existing registry.
Margin AI — 2,258 holders, verified contract, no documented scam. Low-activity speculative AI-branded token.
SPX6900 Mascot (MARIE) — fan-made companion token referencing SPX6900's Marie Rose anime mascot. 1,576 holders. Not an official SPX6900 issuance but trades openly as a meme; no rug pull evidence.
AI GPU token — 501 holders, verified contract. Claims GPU-lending deflationary model; no documented rug pull but thin trading.
Menswear dog (BODHI) — Shiba Inu menswear-modeling dog meme; 718 holders, verified contract. Speculative meme, no scam evidence.
Maxi Doge (MAXI) — meme coin, 160 holders, verified contract, promotes '1000x leverage' meme branding; no rug pull evidence.

Agora Dollar (AUSD) — fully-backed institutional stablecoin, reserves custodied at State Street, backed by cash/Treasuries/repos. Legitimate; large-scale issuance/redemption flows cause volume spikes.
I Love Puppies meme coin with 24,191 holders, renounced contract, 42.07T supply; legitimate meme coin with strong community, no documented fraud.
Yakushima Inu — CoinGecko reports 'stopped trading 4 months ago on all exchanges'; not a confirmed rug but abandoned/dead project. Past controversies around deletions and Veo3 logo. 925 holders.
BTC Bull Token — presale-launched token from BCBLL Limited (BVI), $8M raised, programmatic BTC airdrops tied to BTC price milestones. Legitimate-launched meme with public team, though speculative.
zkDex — privacy-focused DEX token, 149 holders, 420.69B supply. Distinct from zkLink. Small project, no documented rug pull.
Mind of Pepe (MIND) — meme token with 47 holders, verified contract, no documented scam. Very small project.
SackFurie (SACKS) — celebrity-riff memecoin (Trump 'crypto czar' David Sacks). 100M supply, verified contract. Speculative political meme, no documented fraud.
Reserve Protocol ETHPlus (ETH+) — legitimate RToken / Decentralized Token Folio holding basket of Lido wstETH, Rocket Pool rETH, sfrxETH, Stader ETHx. LST basket; vault rebalancing drives volume.

Wilder World (WILD) — November 3 2025 suffered cascading liquidations from Peapods pLONGWILD Pod (NOT a protocol exploit); fractional pfUSDC backing + lender-exit amplified sell pressure, TVL $32M to zero in hours, price -63% intraday. Design/market-structure failure, not malicious.

Kelp DAO Restaked ETH — April 2026 LayerZero bridge exploit drained approx $292M, created material backing shortfall, triggered Aave bad-debt concerns; Lido proposed $5.8M stETH to plug gap. Textbook HACK event.
LuaSwap governance token — legitimate AMM DEX (Ethereum + TomoChain), no seed/founder fees, open-source on GitHub. No documented exploit; project is low-activity but not a scam.
Token named 'Remit' with 328K supply, 359 holders, tax mechanism, remittance-themed. No documented scam or legitimate project matching. Unknown-reputation, low-activity.

MayeMuskINU — brand impersonation of Maye Musk (Elon Musk's mother) with only 12 holders, trading disabled, owner-controlled trading toggle + bot list. Fits the impersonation/soft-rug pattern in the existing CZI/VAL registry entries.
AP3LINK — only 32 holders, 186,282 supply, 1-day trading window in dataset. Unknown reputation, no external references. Could be ApeLink-style brand riff but insufficient evidence to classify.
StakeWise V3 osETH — legitimate liquid staking token, non-custodial, slashing-protected. Legitimate LST whose vault balancing produces the trade-dominance signal, same category as rstETH and ETH+.

c8ntinuum (CTM) — Layer-0 interoperability protocol, listed on 4 exchanges (XT, Uniswap, PancakeSwap, Raydium), multi-chain deployment, 24-hour volume ~$780K; legitimate small-cap, no documented exploit.
I.R.I.S by Virtuals — AI security audit agent co-developed by Virtuals Protocol and Nethermind's AuditAgent team. Listed on Gate Alpha, verified on Virtuals platform. Legitimate AI project.
American Party (AP) — community memecoin referencing Elon/'America Party' theme, 5,044 holders, verified contract. Low-quality meme but no documented fraud.
OpenVision (VISION) — distributed GPU/camera compute token for vision-language models. 2,863 holders, verified contract, minimal volume. No documented fraud. Note ticker collision with Bitpanda VSN.
ETH Strategy — DAT-style 'Saylor's MSTR for ETH in DeFi' project, verified OpenZeppelin-based contract, 264 holders, small-cap. Distinct from legacy Stratis STRAT/STRAX. Legitimate but early-stage.

Degen Arena — play-to-earn party game token from PepUp Studios, listed on Gate Alpha, 2,151 holders, active on Uniswap V2. No documented rug pull. Note ticker collision with Base-chain DEGEN (different project).

BillionDollarPropagandaMachine (X) — only 34 holders, 1-day trading window, unknown reputation. Egregiously high trade-dominance (0.497) suggests wash trading or insider concentration, but no published forensic report.
Angelo token with 420.69B supply, unknown reputation, 1-day trading window, 99.7% trade dominance. Fits pump-and-dump signature but no forensic publication.
Evie Pig token — only 28 holders, 1-day trading window, 99.9% trade dominance. On-chain pattern fits soft-rug / insider-dump but no forensic report.

Token 'URL' — only 8 holders, contract includes blacklist functionality allowing owner to restrict addresses, 14-day trading window, 0.5 trade dominance. Owner-blacklist + extreme concentration strongly suggests honeypot / soft-rug pattern.

Biden Coin — election-themed meme from ElectionDAO, fair launch, 7,543 holders, verified contract, no malicious features identified, $3.1M Uniswap liquidity. Speculative political meme without fraud evidence.

Theo Short Duration US Treasury Fund (thBILL) — institutional tokenized T-bill product from Theo, $162M on-chain market cap, cross-chain via LayerZero. Legitimate RWA product; rebalancing/redemption drives high trade-dominance signature.

Anime Bitcoin ($ANIBTC) — 1-day trading window, 99.8% trade dominance, contract has owner-controlled tax + manual swap + fund extraction functions. Pattern fits pump-and-dump but not definitively documented as fraud.
Tesla Dog (DOGIMUS) — meme token riffing on Elon Musk's robotic dog concept. All-time high $0.002 July 2025, 219-day trading history. Speculative meme, no documented fraud.

f(x) Protocol SavingFxUSD (fxSAVE) — delta-neutral auto-compounding yield vault for stablecoins, built on Morpho, 27M supply, $29M market cap, 18% APY. Legitimate DeFi yield-bearing vault whose rebalancing drives the volume signal.

Catgirl Robot (CatGirl) — ERC-20 meme token with 194 holders, verified contract. Distinct from BSC Catgirl (0x79ebc9a2ce02277a4b5b3a768b1c0a4ed75bd936) that rebranded to Nya. No documented fraud but thin liquidity.

World Liberty Financial governance token — Trump-family-linked DeFi platform, $2.5B market cap, listed on Robinhood. Legitimate (if politically controversial) project. Recent unlock/burn controversy and alleged hidden blacklist backdoor, but not a rug pull; ongoing regulatory scrutiny.
Original Troll Coin — meme token with 1,523 holders, verified contract, no audit but no documented fraud. Note ticker collision with main TROLL at 0xf8ebf4849f1fa4faf0dff2106a173d3a6cb2eb3a.

MetaMask USD (mUSD) — MetaMask's first native stablecoin launched Sept 2025, issued by Bridge via M0 protocol, backed 1:1 by short-term US Treasuries in regulated custody. Legitimate stablecoin; issuance/redemption drives volume spikes. NOT Mantle USD (different product).

Zippie (ZIPT) — 2017-2018 ICO-era payments/remittance project, raised $19.2M, 2,755 holders. Now largely dormant with zero 24h transfers but no documented scam — just an abandoned legitimate-origin project.
